HomePage.metaDescription: Non-custodial crypto payments directly to your wallet. Privacy friendly checkout. Set up in minutes.
HomePage.heroSubtitle: Privacy oriented. Wallet to wallet. Set up in minutes.
HomePage.heroBody: Receive crypto payments from your store or app directly to your wallet. We do not custody your funds — you keep full control.
HomePage.highlightsTitle: Built like the gateways merchants already trust

nonCustodial.title: Non custodial
nonCustodial.description: Payments go directly to your wallet.

privacyFriendly.title: Privacy friendly
privacyFriendly.description: Checkout stays on your site. We track status — we do not hold balances.

quickSetup.title: Quick setup
quickSetup.description: Connect a wallet and create your first payment link in minutes.

HomePage.apiTitle: One-stop API for BTC, ETH, USDT & more
HomePage.apiDescription: Full control with the Crypto Pay API. Clear documentation, webhooks, and support for custom checkout flows.
HomePage.getStartedDescription: Join now to access payment technology that delivers smooth, quick checkout experiences for your customers.

1.title: Connect your wallet
1.description: Add the public address where you want to receive payments. No private keys required.

2.title: Create a payment request
2.description: Set amount, coin, and reference. Share a link or call the API from your backend.

3.title: Track on-chain confirmation
3.description: We detect the transaction and update status from unpaid → in process → paid.

directSettlement.title: Wallet to wallet
directSettlement.description: Funds never sit in a pooled merchant account. Settlement is direct to your wallet.

noChargebacks.title: No chargebacks
noChargebacks.description: On-chain payments are final once confirmed — no card-style reversals.

limitedKyc.title: Risk-based onboarding
limitedKyc.description: Requirements vary by risk profile. Settlement is direct to your wallet — you keep control of funds.

unifiedApi.title: Unified experience
unifiedApi.description: A single place to create payment requests and follow status from link to confirmation.

meta.title: FAQ | Crypto Pay
meta.description: Frequently asked questions about Crypto Pay — wallet settlement, supported assets, pricing, and API integration.
meta.ogDescription: Answers to common questions about accepting crypto payments with Crypto Pay.

hero.title: Answers for operators and owners
hero.description: If you have a unique workflow, reach out and we'll design a plan for you.

cta.title: Still have questions?
cta.description: Contact us and we will help with your setup.

whatIsCryptoPay.question: What is Crypto Pay?
whatIsCryptoPay.answer: Crypto Pay helps you track and accept crypto payments. Payments go directly to your wallet — we are non-custodial and privacy oriented.

howFastSetup.question: How fast can I set up?
howFastSetup.answer: Most merchants connect a wallet and create a first payment link in minutes. API integrations typically take a few hours depending on your stack.

whatDoINeed.question: What do I need to get started?
whatDoINeed.answer: A wallet address you control and an account on Crypto Pay. For custom sites, you will also want a callback URL or webhook endpoint for payment status updates.

supportedCoins.question: What coins do you support?
supportedCoins.answer: We support BTC, ETH, LTC, USDT, and USDC. Additional assets may be added over time.

wherePaymentsGo.question: Where do payments go?
wherePaymentsGo.answer: Directly to your wallet. With Crypto Pay, funds are not held in a pooled merchant balance — settlement is wallet to wallet.

paymentStatus.question: How do you track payment status?
paymentStatus.answer: We watch the blockchain for transactions that match your payment request. Status moves from unpaid → in process → paid, similar to standard crypto checkout flows.

kycRequirements.question: What are your KYC requirements?
kycRequirements.answer: Because we do not process or store payments, KYC is limited and based on risk assessment — not on holding your funds.

privateKeys.question: Do you need my private keys?
privateKeys.answer: No. You only provide a public wallet address. Crypto Pay never asks for private keys.

hasApi.question: Is there an API?
hasApi.answer: Yes. One unified API for creating charges, checking status, and receiving webhook callbacks when payments confirm.

websiteIntegration.question: How do I integrate on my website?
websiteIntegration.answer: Use payment links for no-code flows, or the REST API and webhooks for custom checkout. See the Developers page for a quick start.

fees.question: How do fees work?
fees.answer: Standard pricing is a {percent}% base fee per successful transaction, billed monthly — not deducted at checkout. Contact us for Business Scale volume pricing.

platformFees.question: Are there setup or monthly platform fees?
platformFees.answer: No hidden platform charges on the standard plan. You pay when you successfully receive a payment, per our published pricing.

supportIncluded.question: What support is included?
supportIncluded.answer: Email onboarding support on Standard. Business Scale includes priority support and optional SLA coverage.
